description: Ice material items that drop as loot and reference ice properties. Magically preserved to never melt.

items.name: Frozen Water
items.description: Magically preserved ice that never melts.

items.name: Glacial Ice Chunk
items.description: Ancient ice from frozen glaciers, incredibly dense.

items.name: Permafrost Shard
items.description: Eternally frozen earth and ice, harder than steel.

items.name: Eternal Ice Crystal
items.description: Ice that has existed since the dawn of time, utterly unbreakable.

items.name: Black Ice Fragment
items.description: Dark ice from the void between planes, cold beyond measure.

items.name: Prismatic Ice
items.description: Rainbow-hued ice that refracts magical energy.
